Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kiro]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Kiro is the first prince of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Seishen Kiro is the son of King Dakata.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Kiro and Meira were looking for the Blackflame boy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's armor glows with a silver-and-yellow corona.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's sword has blue sparks on the blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro has a shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's shield is red-hot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's armor is made entirely of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro's Path has aspects of earth and force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro is a prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Kiro is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Kiro has a noble bloodline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Kiro may reach Overlord someday.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Kiro is an opponent Lindon may have to fight again before reaching Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Kiro is a star Underlord of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Kiro's shield is a heavy metal disc with a lion's face on it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Seishen Kiro uses a shield with a lion on it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Meira is focused on Kiro.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Kiro is a Truegold who can stand up to Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro is a person Seishen Daji might have joined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro's armor is falling apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro has lost his shield and his left arm is numb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro launched a bright blue lance at Lindon's back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro is an ally of Daji and Meira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro used a Striker technique in his sword that produced blue lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Seishen Kiro is associated with an urn.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The world stops against Seishen Kiro.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Kiro is the brother of Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Kiro is dead.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Kiro was the original crown prince.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Kiro is Daji's older brother.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
